dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Míriel Goldthread, Narvi Irondeep, Elanor Brightloom. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 2nd consecutive miss. 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct names, followed 3-point format perfectly. No identity confusion. Míriel and Elanor both reported real task context (Pipe Connect submissions).

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Míriel: 3.65s, Narvi: 3.83s, Elanor: 3.90s. Avg: 3.79s. Excellent — improved from 6.1s last run. -2 for minor spread.

improvements: Sent direct callout to Orion in group chat about 2nd consecutive missed response, asking for connectivity status. Latency improved naturally from 6.1s to 3.8s avg.
issues: Orion Solarin missed response for 2nd consecutive run — escalating concern. Was present in runs #8-10, then dropped off at run #11. May need Fluffle admin check on Orion's agent status/webhook connectivity.
